ground_truth.title: Dental Care | ONE Health Ohio
ground_truth.main_content:
You'll find state-of-the-art treatment facilities at ONE Health Ohio, along with caring, compassionate Dentists, Dental Assistants and Dental Hygienists. Dental services are available for adults and children at ONE Health Ohio centers in Trumbull and Mahoning Counties.

Procedures and Services

- Screening Exams
- Cleanings
- Extractions
- X-rays
- Tooth-Colored Fillings
- Preventive Care
- Orthodontic Evaluations
- Root Canals on Select Teeth
- Digital Radiographic Analysis
- Dental Emergency

ONE Health Ohio Centers that Offer Dental

- Youngstown Community Health Center
- Lloyd McCoy Community Health Center
- Warren West Community Health Center
- Falls Family Care

Walk In Center at Lloyd McCoy

Do you have a dental emergency? We have a walk in center available most saturdays from 1 – 4 pm. You can also reach us by phone for any questions or concerns at 330-747-9551.
